description: Made of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment to carry a 15.4" laptop with a velcro closureOne earphones gate on the topOne zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches and a zipped pouch to carry your laptop cableOne smaller zipped pocket on the front with an asymmetric openingOne elasticated pocket on the left side and a zipped pocket on the right side for enhanced spacePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and rubber legs at the base
